verdict.headline: Safe to transact: this address is Binance Hot Wallet 20, a well-known centralized exchange wallet with no sanctions hits.
verdict.reasoning: The sanctions check returned a clean result with no matches against the active sanctions corpus. Web sentiment evidence strongly identifies this address as 'Binance: Hot Wallet 20' on Blockscan, holding tens of billions of dollars across 24 chains — consistent with a major, publicly-known exchange hot wallet rather than a malicious actor. The labels and contract_analysis endpoints returned only API metadata (no specific risk labels or vulnerabilities), and on-chain history was unresolved, but the strong exchange identification combined with clean sanctions outweighs those gaps. Users should still always confirm the deposit address with their exchange before sending.

findings.finding: No matches against the active sanctions corpus (risk_level: low).
Label API returned only metadata; no specific risk or safety labels surfaced from this source.
Multiple explorer sources (Blockscan) identify this address as 'Binance: Hot Wallet 20', a known centralized exchange wallet holding ~$40B across 24 chains.
No contract vulnerabilities reported; address behaves as an EOA/exchange wallet, so contract analysis is not applicable.
On-chain history signal was unresolved by the data layer; not factored into the verdict.

services.rationale: Screens against 12,997+ sanctioned/blacklisted crypto addresses across the broadest set of lists (OFAC SDN, USDT/USDC Blacklist, Ransomwhere, OpenSanctions, UK OFSI) at the lowest tier price of $0.001, making it the strongest wallet-specific sanctions candidate.
Explicitly labels crypto addresses as exchange, mixer, contract, or known entity — the clearest match to the 'labels' category intent — at a competitive $0.005 price with all qualityScores unknown.
Provides on-chain ETH & ERC20 transaction history at the lowest available price ($0.001), directly matching the category intent for a risk-verification run.
Broad web search across crypto sources is the best fit for surfacing wallet/entity web sentiment signals, and shares the same price tier as alternatives while being crypto-focused.
Combines vulnerability scanning, risk scoring, and an audit checklist in one purpose-built AI-agent tool at a low $0.005 price, offering the most comprehensive coverage for contract analysis.
